Intraday post (27/Oct)

Window of Risk:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly post:

FOMC week, Greeks breakdown - Weekly post (27-31/Oct)

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile is very convex, highly positive. To the downside we have a significant negative speed, selling downside bets (most supportive at 6789.97), but to the upside the gamma convexity is like 14x steeper. This generates a significant call wall at 6882.49, this functionates rather like a rejection level for the spot now, but it is strong enough to provide supportive passive flows for the market.

The centroid area until these supportive flows significantly influence the spot is 6851.04 - 6865.03But the true line in the sand from momentum perspective is 6837.33, this is a strong line (local zero-vanna there, strongest into the PM session). Below we have a lot of supports: 6825 is a local pin after 11AM, if 6811 is held;During the first 1.5 - 2 hours spot can break below it.

Downside pivot is at 6810.30below this, spot can retest 6789.97 only to pin there (that the most supportive line).If downside vol catches a bid (market doesn’t bet on this), then 6755 can be retested, a nice intraday 0DTE reversion trade opportunity back to the 6800 pin.

Upside pivot is at 6877.99here volatility must be suppressed to hell to climb up more. This should also provide us a very risky trade opportunity back to 6837.33, and then magnetized back towards the centroid during the PM.No 0DTE here, 2DTE is better or futures. Premiums will be killed today!

What the market is betting on is huge call and put premium burning, and ranging above the 6837.33 line, around the centroid. Thats the primal bet.The secondary is a pin down to 6825The third is a pin to 6789.97And the forth is the upside testing with grind down.

Spot is literally caged.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
